penalties.detail: 86% of declarations are in dynamic languages — runtime coupling is invisible to static extraction (clarity capped at 85)
7% of declaration weight has no edges

layers.name: Launchers / CLI
layers.summary: Entry points and setup tooling: ga_cli package, launch.pyw / hub.pyw launchers, mykey setup wizard

classes.name: render_segments
classes.signature: def render_segments(segments, suffix=''): # 整块重画：调用方用 slot.container() 包裹，保证 DOM 路径稳定、跨 rerun 对齐（消除"灰色重影"）。 # heartbeat 空转时 segments 不变 → Streamlit 后端 diff 无变化 → 前端零闪烁； # 但 container/markdown 本身是 API 调用，StopException 仍会被抛出（abort 照常起作用）。

classes.name: _tile
classes.signature: def _tile(s: str, style: str, width: int | None = None) -> str: # Re-assert style after every reset so muted-markdown \x1b[0m can't punch # a hole in the block. When `width` is provided we pad with explicit # bg-active spaces — prompt-toolkit's cell renderer doesn't honour # \x1b[K (erase-to-EOL) inside its own buffer, so PTK-bound scrollback # would otherwise leave the row gap exposed. Fall back to \x1b[K for # legacy callers writing straight to the terminal (no PTK), where the # erase command still fills correctly.

classes.name: _border

classes.name: _pet
classes.signature: def _pet(el: float, frame: int) -> str: # `frame` ticks at the spinner rate (0.1s). Pet emotes feel frantic if # they swap every tick, so callers divide the spin counter (currently /5) # to land a ~0.5s pet-frame cadence while the spinner glyph stays snappy.

classes.name: _set_term_title
classes.signature: def _set_term_title(text: str) -> None: # PTK app run redirects sys.stdout to sb_agent.log (see # _run_prompt_toolkit), so sys.stdout.write here would write OSC 0 # into the log file instead of the terminal — title silently # frozen at the very first pre-PTK call. Write straight to fd 1 # via os.write, same approach as _w().

layers.name: Agent Core / Seed Loop
layers.summary: The ~100-line agent loop and the 9 atomic tools: agent_loop.py, ga.py handler, agentmain.py session wiring, code_run header

classes.name: BaseHandler
classes.description_zh: 工具处理器基类：dispatch 把工具调用按 do_ 前缀路由到对应方法，并在前后触发 tool_before/tool_after 插件 hook
classes.description_en: Base tool handler: dispatch routes a tool call to its do_-prefixed method, firing the tool_before/tool_after plugin hooks around it

classes.name: get_pretty_json
classes.description_zh: 工具调用参数美化：把 script 字段按分号折行后输出缩进 JSON，便于日志阅读
classes.description_en: Pretty-print tool-call args: wrap the script field at semicolons and emit indented JSON for readable logs

classes.name: agent_runner_loop
classes.signature: def agent_runner_loop(client, system_prompt, user_input, handler, tools_schema, max_turns=40, verbose=True, initial_user_content=None, yield_info=False):
classes.description_zh: Agent 的核心自主循环：感知环境→推理→调用工具→写入记忆→再循环，约 100 行驱动整个执行流程
classes.description_en: The ~100-line core autonomous loop — perceive state, reason, dispatch tools, write memory, repeat — that drives the whole agent

classes.name: GenericAgent
classes.description_zh: 顶层 Agent 编排器：装配系统提示、工具 schema、LLM 会话与分层记忆，并驱动 agent_runner_loop
classes.description_en: Top-level agent orchestrator that assembles the system prompt, tool schema, LLM session and layered memory, then drives the runner loop

classes.name: code_run
classes.signature: def code_run(code, code_type="python", timeout=60, cwd=None, code_cwd=None, stop_signal=None, maxlen=10000, myprint=safe_print):

classes.name: first_init_driver
classes.description_zh: 浏览器驱动懒初始化：首次 web 操作时启动 TMWebDriver 并等待浏览器标签接入
classes.description_en: Lazy browser-driver init: start TMWebDriver on the first web call and wait for a browser tab to attach

classes.name: web_scan
classes.description_zh: web_scan 原子工具：抓取当前页面的简化 HTML 与标签页列表，过滤边栏/浮动等非主体内容以省 token
classes.description_en: web_scan atomic tool: capture the current page as simplified HTML plus the tab list, stripping sidebars/overlays to save tokens

classes.name: web_execute_js
classes.description_zh: web_execute_js 原子工具：在真实浏览器中执行 JS 控制页面，并捕获返回值与页面变化
classes.description_en: web_execute_js atomic tool: run JS in the real browser to drive the page, capturing the return value and DOM changes

classes.name: file_patch
classes.signature: def file_patch(path: str, old_content: str, new_content: str):

classes.name: file_read
classes.signature: def file_read(path, start=1, keyword=None, count=200, show_linenos=True):

classes.name: GenericAgentHandler
classes.description_zh: 工具处理器：以 do_ 前缀实现 9 个原子工具（code_run / file_* / web_* / ask_user / memory），由循环的 dispatch 调用
classes.description_en: Tool handler implementing the 9 atomic tools as do_-prefixed methods (code_run / file_* / web_* / ask_user / memory), invoked by the loop dispatch

classes.name: get_global_memory
classes.description_zh: 拼装注入系统提示的全局记忆块：读取 memory 目录结构说明与 global_mem_insight 洞察文本（按语言切换）
classes.description_en: Assemble the global-memory block injected into the system prompt: the memory directory structure plus the global_mem_insight text, language-aware

layers.name: Plugins / Hooks
layers.summary: Hook registry and optional plugins (langfuse tracing, project mode) loaded by the kernel

classes.name: clear
classes.description_zh: 清除指定事件或全部 hook 注册
classes.description_en: Clear hook registrations for one event or for all

classes.name: has
classes.description_zh: 查询某事件是否有已注册 hook
classes.description_en: Check whether an event has registered hooks

classes.name: load
classes.description_zh: 插件加载器：发现并注册生命周期 hook（tool_before/after 等），是框架的扩展契约
classes.description_en: Plugin loader: discover and register lifecycle hooks (tool_before/after, …) — the framework's extension contract

classes.name: inject_project_context
classes.description_zh: 项目模式 hook：每个用户轮把激活项目的 L1 规则与记忆文件指针注入最后一条 user message，实现跨会话项目记忆
classes.description_en: Project-mode hook: each user turn, append the active project's L1 rules and memory-file pointers to the last user message — cross-session project memory with zero core-code changes

layers.name: Memory / Skills
layers.summary: Layered memory and crystallized skill scripts: OCR, ADB UI, keychain, vision template, session compression, SOP helpers

classes.name: ui
classes.description_zh: Android UI 采集：一键 dump 并解析手机界面树（优先 uiautomator2），驱动 ADB 移动端控制
classes.description_en: Android UI capture: one-shot dump + parse of the device view tree (uiautomator2 first), powering ADB mobile control

classes.name: CL
classes.description_zh: 一站式任务清单：checklist 模式由 master 逐项执行，mapreduce 模式自动拉起 BBS 与 N 个 worker 并行
classes.description_en: One-stop task checklist: the master executes items sequentially in checklist mode, or auto-spawns the BBS plus N parallel workers in mapreduce mode

classes.name: SecretStr
classes.description_zh: 防泄漏密钥包装：repr 只显示掩码预览，必须显式 .use() 才能取原值，支撑 XOR 加密的本地钥匙串
classes.description_en: Leak-proof secret wrapper: repr shows only a masked preview and the raw value requires an explicit .use(), backing the XOR-encrypted local keychain

classes.name: MouseDown
classes.description_zh: 底层鼠标按下原语（win32api）
classes.description_en: Low-level mouse-down primitive (win32api)

classes.name: MouseUp
classes.description_zh: 底层鼠标抬起原语（win32api）
classes.description_en: Low-level mouse-up primitive (win32api)

classes.name: MouseClick
classes.description_zh: 底层鼠标点击：绕过 pyautogui 直接走 win32api，提供稳定的键鼠/截图控制原语
classes.description_en: Low-level mouse click via win32api (bypassing pyautogui) — a stable keyboard/mouse/screenshot control primitive

classes.name: MouseDClick
classes.description_zh: 底层鼠标双击原语（win32api）
classes.description_en: Low-level double-click primitive (win32api)

classes.name: Click
classes.description_zh: 带 DPI 换算与生效校验的坐标点击：点击前后截图比对确认界面发生变化
classes.description_en: DPI-aware coordinate click with verification — screenshot-diffs before/after to confirm the click took effect

classes.name: Activate
classes.description_zh: 稳定切换 Windows 前台窗口：先恢复最小化窗口，发假 Alt-up 绕过前台锁再 SetForegroundWindow
classes.description_en: Reliably bring a Windows window to the foreground: restore if minimized, fake an Alt-up to defeat the foreground lock, then SetForegroundWindow

classes.name: GetWRect
classes.description_zh: 把 'left2'/'top3' 这类屏幕区域描述换算成像素矩形，用于限定视觉查找范围
classes.description_en: Convert a screen-region spec like 'left2'/'top3' into a pixel rectangle to scope visual searches

classes.name: ocr_image
classes.description_zh: 本地 OCR：对 PIL 图像做文字识别
classes.description_en: Local OCR: recognize text from a PIL image

classes.name: build_rules
classes.description_zh: 进程内存扫描规则构建：为从目标进程内存提取数据生成匹配规则
classes.description_en: Build process-memory scan rules to extract data from a target process's memory

classes.name: scan_memory
classes.signature: def scan_memory(pid, pattern, context_size=256, mode='auto', llm_mode=False):
classes.description_zh: 进程内存扫描：VirtualQueryEx 遍历可读内存区域并用 yara 规则匹配提取数据
classes.description_en: Process-memory scan: walk readable regions via VirtualQueryEx and extract data with yara rule matches

classes.name: detect
classes.description_zh: 屏幕 UI 元素检测统一入口：YOLO 定位 + RapidOCR 识别，返回可点击元素列表，支撑视觉操作
classes.description_en: Unified screen UI-element detector: YOLO localization + RapidOCR, returning clickable elements for vision-driven control

classes.name: ask_vision
classes.signature: def ask_vision(image_input, prompt="详细描述这张图片的内容", timeout=60, max_pixels=1440000, backend=DEFAULT_BACKEND):
classes.description_zh: 视觉问答：把截图发给多模态模型并返回理解结果，是 GUI 视觉感知的入口
classes.description_en: Vision Q&A: send a screenshot to a multimodal model and return its understanding — the GUI vision entry

classes.name: _call_openai_compat
classes.signature: def _call_openai_compat(b64, prompt, timeout, *, apibase, apikey, model, proxy=None):

classes.name: compress_session
classes.description_zh: L4 会话归档：将原始 model_responses 日志压缩为精简的长程记忆档案
classes.description_en: L4 session archival: compress a raw model_responses log into a distilled long-horizon memory record

classes.name: extract_history
classes.description_zh: 从会话文件中抽取 [USER]/[Agent] 历史，供长程记忆复用
classes.description_en: Extract [USER]/[Agent] history from a session file for long-horizon recall

classes.name: format_history_block
classes.description_zh: 把单个会话的历史行格式化为 all_histories.txt 的 SESSION 分隔块
classes.description_en: Format one session's history lines into the SESSION-delimited block used by all_histories.txt

classes.name: batch_process
classes.description_zh: 批量压缩+抽取+归档会话日志（默认 dry-run 安全）
classes.description_en: Batch compress + extract + archive session logs (dry-run by default)

classes.name: complete_task
classes.signature: def complete_task(taskname: str, historyline: str, report_path: str) -> str:

layers.name: LLM Core
layers.summary: Model-agnostic LLM sessions, streaming, tool-call protocol adapters (llmcore.py), key templates, supergrok proxy

classes.name: reload_mykeys
classes.description_zh: 密钥热加载：监测 mykey.py/json 变更并重新载入 API key 与模型配置
classes.description_en: Hot-reload of mykey.py/json — re-imports API keys and model config when the file changes

classes.name: compress_history_tags
classes.signature: def compress_history_tags(messages, keep_recent=10, max_len=800, force=False, interval=5):

classes.name: trim_messages_history
classes.description_zh: 上下文裁剪：在超出 context_win 字符上限时裁剪历史消息，维持 <30K 低上下文
classes.description_en: Context trimmer: prune history messages when they exceed the context_win char cap, holding the <30K low-context budget

classes.name: BaseSession
classes.description_zh: LLM 会话基类：管理消息历史、压缩、缓存标记与重试，派生出各 provider 会话
classes.description_en: Base LLM session: manages message history, compression, cache markers and retries; parent of all provider sessions

classes.name: ClaudeSession
classes.description_zh: Claude 兼容会话：经 OpenAI 兼容/中转通道访问 Anthropic 模型
classes.description_en: Claude-compatible session: reaches Anthropic models via OpenAI-compatible/relay channels

classes.name: LLMSession
classes.description_zh: OpenAI 兼容会话：把 Claude 风格消息规整并转为 OAI 格式，经 _openai_stream 流式问答
classes.description_en: OpenAI-compatible session: normalize Claude-style messages into OAI format and stream via _openai_stream

classes.name: NativeClaudeSession
classes.description_zh: 原生 Anthropic 会话：直连 Messages API，解析 SSE 流与 tool_use/thinking 内容块
classes.description_en: Native Anthropic session: talks to the Messages API directly, parsing the SSE stream and tool_use/thinking blocks

classes.name: openai_tools_to_claude
classes.description_zh: 工具 schema 转换：把 OpenAI function 工具定义转成 Claude input_schema 格式（已是 Claude 格式则透传）
classes.description_en: Tool-schema converter: turn OpenAI function tool definitions into Claude input_schema format, passing Claude-shaped entries through

classes.name: MockToolCall
classes.description_zh: 把文本解析出的工具调用包装成 OpenAI 风格 tool_call 对象，统一下游处理
classes.description_en: Wrap a text-parsed tool call as an OpenAI-style tool_call object so downstream handling stays uniform

classes.name: ToolClient
classes.description_zh: 工具调用 LLM 客户端：统一封装多 provider 的带工具调用对话，是 Agent 与模型交互的主入口
classes.description_en: Tool-calling LLM client: a unified multi-provider chat-with-tools wrapper — the agent's main entry to the model

classes.name: MixinSession
classes.description_zh: 多会话故障转移：按 llm_nos 串联同组会话，空响应/报错自动切换，冷却期后弹回主会话
classes.description_en: Multi-session failover: chain same-group sessions per llm_nos, auto-switching on empty/error responses and springing back to the primary after a cooldown

classes.name: NativeToolClient
classes.description_zh: 原生协议工具客户端：维护 tool_result 配对与 <summary> 行动规范系统提示，桥接 Agent 与原生模型会话
classes.description_en: Native-protocol tool client: pairs pending tool_results, injects the <summary> action-protocol system prompt, and bridges the agent to native model sessions

classes.name: resolve_session
classes.description_zh: 会话解析器：按 mykey 配置选择并实例化合适的模型会话（Claude / OpenAI-native / 工具调用）
classes.description_en: Session resolver: pick and instantiate the right model session (Claude / OpenAI-native / tool-calling) from mykey config

classes.name: resolve_client
classes.description_zh: 客户端解析器：在 resolve_session 之上按会话类型包装出 NativeToolClient 或 ToolClient
classes.description_en: Client resolver: wraps resolve_session's session in a NativeToolClient or ToolClient depending on its type

classes.name: TokenManager
classes.description_zh: SuperGrok 代理的令牌管理：登录、缓存与自动刷新 grok 访问令牌
classes.description_en: SuperGrok proxy token manager: login, cache and auto-refresh grok access tokens

classes.name: make_proxy_handler
classes.description_zh: 生成绑定 TokenManager 的 HTTP 代理处理器：把本地 OpenAI 风格请求换上 OAuth token 转发到 xAI API
classes.description_en: Build the HTTP proxy handler bound to a TokenManager: swap local OpenAI-style requests onto an OAuth token and forward them to the xAI API

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: SuperGrok 本地代理 CLI 入口：login / refresh / serve / models / test 子命令
classes.description_en: SuperGrok local-proxy CLI entry: login / refresh / serve / models / test subcommands

layers.name: Web / Browser Control
layers.summary: TMWebDriver real-browser control plane: local WS/HTTP server, Chrome CDP-bridge extension, HTML simplification

classes.name: Session
classes.description_zh: 浏览器标签会话：跟踪每个接入标签的连接通道（ws/http），支持重连与失活标记
classes.description_en: Browser-tab session: track each attached tab's connection channel (ws/http) with reconnect and disconnect marking

classes.name: TMWebDriver
classes.description_zh: 浏览器驱动：通过 CDP 桥接注入真实浏览器（保留登录态），统一执行 JS、读取页面、管理标签页
classes.description_en: Browser driver that injects into a real browser via a CDP bridge (sessions preserved) to run JS, read pages, and manage tabs

classes.name: get_temp_texts
classes.description_zh: 停止页面瞬态文本监视器并收集监视期间闪现过的文本（toast/弹层等）
classes.description_en: Stop the page's transient-text monitor and collect texts that flashed during the watch window (toasts, popups)

classes.name: get_main_block
classes.description_zh: 在页面内执行 optHTML 提取主体内容块，可选纯文本模式并压缩空白
classes.description_en: Run optHTML in-page to extract the main content block, with an optional whitespace-compacted text-only mode

classes.name: get_html
classes.signature: def get_html(driver, cutlist=False, maxchars=35000, instruction="", extra_js="", text_only=False):
classes.description_zh: 网页感知核心：将原始 DOM 优化压缩为面向 token 的简化 HTML，并可监测页面变化
classes.description_en: Web-perception core: optimize/compress raw DOM into token-friendly simplified HTML and track page changes

classes.name: smart_truncate
classes.description_zh: 预算内智能截断 DOM：穿透单子链找分叉点，top3 子树按比例分担或从尾部删减
classes.description_en: Budgeted DOM truncation: descend to the branching point, then share the cut proportionally among the top-3 subtrees or trim from the tail

classes.name: execute_js_rich
classes.description_zh: 富执行 JS：跑脚本的同时监测页面变化、新标签与跳转，把返回值与页面反馈打包返回
classes.description_en: Rich JS execution: run a script while monitoring DOM changes, new tabs and reloads, returning the value bundled with page feedback

flows.name: Agent 工具循环 / Agent Tool Loop
flows.description: 感知—推理—行动核心循环：主会话把消息交给 LLM，模型以 tool_use 选择原子工具，处理器执行并回填结果，直至任务完成
flows.description_zh: 感知—推理—行动核心循环：主会话把消息交给 LLM，模型以 tool_use 选择原子工具，处理器执行并回填结果，直至任务完成
flows.description_en: The perceive–reason–act core loop: the session feeds messages to the LLM, the model picks an atomic tool via tool_use, the handler executes it and feeds the result back until the task completes

steps.label_zh: 简化 HTML / 执行结果

flows.name: LLM 会话与流式解析 / LLM Session & Streaming
flows.description: 模型无关的会话栈：按 mykey 配置解析会话实现，构造请求并流式解析 SSE 为 tool_use/thinking 块，超限时裁剪压缩历史
flows.description_zh: 模型无关的会话栈：按 mykey 配置解析会话实现，构造请求并流式解析 SSE 为 tool_use/thinking 块，超限时裁剪压缩历史
flows.description_en: Model-agnostic session stack: resolve mykey config to a session class, build requests and parse the SSE stream into tool_use/thinking blocks, trimming and compressing history over budget

flows.name: IM 机器人前端 / Chat-Bot Frontends
flows.description: 飞书/企微/Discord/钉钉/QQ 五个 IM 机器人共享 AgentChatMixin 会话逻辑，把消息平台接成 Agent 对话界面
flows.description_zh: 飞书/企微/Discord/钉钉/QQ 五个 IM 机器人共享 AgentChatMixin 会话逻辑，把消息平台接成 Agent 对话界面
flows.description_en: Five IM bots (Feishu / WeCom / Discord / DingTalk / QQ) share the AgentChatMixin chat logic, turning messaging platforms into agent conversation UIs

steps.label_zh: 统一消息与斜杠命令处理
分片回复 / 完成卡片

flows.name: TUI 终端前端 / TUI Frontend
flows.description: Textual 终端前端：流式渲染、工具调用卡片、/model 与 /effort 运行时切换、计划进度条与 /continue 恢复
flows.description_zh: Textual 终端前端：流式渲染、工具调用卡片、/model 与 /effort 运行时切换、计划进度条与 /continue 恢复
flows.description_en: Textual terminal frontend: streamed rendering, tool-call cards, runtime /model & /effort switching, plan bar and /continue restore

flows.name: 初始化配置向导 / Setup Wizard
flows.description: 交互式引导配置 LLM 与消息平台：探测可用模型、扫描平台凭据并生成 mykey.py
flows.description_zh: 交互式引导配置 LLM 与消息平台：探测可用模型、扫描平台凭据并生成 mykey.py
flows.description_en: Interactive setup: configure LLMs and messaging platforms, probe available models, scan platform credentials and generate mykey.py

extra_nodes.name: mykey.py
extra_nodes.description_zh: API 密钥与模型/平台配置文件
extra_nodes.description_en: API keys plus model/platform config file

flows.name: CLI 命令分发 / CLI Command Dispatch
flows.description: ga 命令行入口：列出/启动各前端与工具进程、查看状态、git pull 自更新
flows.description_zh: ga 命令行入口：列出/启动各前端与工具进程、查看状态、git pull 自更新
flows.description_en: The ga CLI entry: list and launch frontends and tools, check status, self-update via git pull

flows.name: ACP 编辑器桥接 / ACP Editor Bridge
flows.description: 把 GenericAgent 暴露为 ACP 服务：解析编辑器的 JSON-RPC 请求，转发到 Agent 会话并以 session/update 流式回推
flows.description_zh: 把 GenericAgent 暴露为 ACP 服务：解析编辑器的 JSON-RPC 请求，转发到 Agent 会话并以 session/update 流式回推
flows.description_en: Expose GenericAgent over ACP: parse the editor's JSON-RPC, forward prompts to an agent session and stream session/update notifications back

flows.name: 子代理团队编排 / Sub-agent Orchestration
flows.description: Conductor 子代理池：派生多个 GenericAgent 工作者并行执行，收集回合摘要并经卡片广播协调
flows.description_zh: Conductor 子代理池：派生多个 GenericAgent 工作者并行执行，收集回合摘要并经卡片广播协调
flows.description_en: The conductor's sub-agent pool: spawn parallel GenericAgent workers, collect turn summaries and coordinate via broadcast cards

steps.label_zh: 回合摘要 / 最终回复

flows.name: 项目模式记忆注入 / Project-Mode Memory Injection
flows.description: 插件经 agent_before hook 在每个用户轮注入激活项目的规则与记忆指针，实现跨会话项目记忆
flows.description_zh: 插件经 agent_before hook 在每个用户轮注入激活项目的规则与记忆指针，实现跨会话项目记忆
flows.description_en: Via the agent_before hook the plugin injects the active project's rules and memory pointers each user turn, giving cross-session project memory

flows.name: 定时自维护 / Scheduled Self-Maintenance
flows.description: 调度器按冷却周期触发记忆维护：压缩原始会话、抽取历史并归档进 L4 记忆库
flows.description_zh: 调度器按冷却周期触发记忆维护：压缩原始会话、抽取历史并归档进 L4 记忆库
flows.description_en: The scheduler fires memory maintenance on a cooldown: compress raw sessions, extract history and archive it into the L4 memory store

extra_nodes.name: all_histories.txt
extra_nodes.description_zh: L4 记忆库的会话历史归档
extra_nodes.description_en: The L4 memory store session-history archive

flows.name: 桌面 Web 前端 / Desktop Web UI
flows.description: Tauri 桌面壳的 Web UI：提交输入、轮询消息并增量渲染会话
flows.description_zh: Tauri 桌面壳的 Web UI：提交输入、轮询消息并增量渲染会话
flows.description_en: The Tauri desktop shell's web UI: submit input, poll messages and incrementally render the conversation
